entrypoints.name: web_api
entrypoints.description: FastAPI server serving REST API, WebSocket, token generation, health checks

entrypoints.name: voice_worker
entrypoints.description: LiveKit agent worker handling voice sessions, STT/TTS/LLM pipeline

entrypoints.name: service_router
entrypoints.description: Routes to web_api or voice_worker based on SERVICE_TYPE environment variable

routing_logic.mechanism: SERVICE_TYPE environment variable checked at startup
